raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.3": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The critique identifies several inconsistencies (architecture mismatch, metric misinterpretation) but doesn't fully walk through the implications or propose fixes.",
    "R1.3": "Some evidence-claim mismatches are flagged (e.g., confidence claims without backing), but not all are addressed.",
    "RX.1": "The critique lacks explicit discussion of uncertainty in the presented claims. It focuses more on factual accuracy than confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "The critique mostly stays within the requested scope, though it delves into some tangential areas (e.g., prior work) that are not directly relevant to the active set.",
    "RX.4": "No harmful content is identified, and the critique avoids introducing new errors or regressions in its analysis.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks detailed discussion of source attribution and traceability for its claims and suggestions."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies several inconsistencies (architecture mismatch, metric misinterpretation) but doesn't fully walk through the implications or propose fixes.
rationale.R1.3: Some evidence-claim mismatches are flagged (e.g., confidence claims without backing), but not all are addressed.
rationale.RX.1: The critique lacks explicit discussion of uncertainty in the presented claims. It focuses more on factual accuracy than confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The critique mostly stays within the requested scope, though it delves into some tangential areas (e.g., prior work) that are not directly relevant to the active set.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content is identified, and the critique avoids introducing new errors or regressions in its analysis.
rationale.RX.5: The critique lacks detailed discussion of source attribution and traceability for its claims and suggestions.
